raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "CalABLE Accounts are designed to help those with disability-related expenses save for future expenses without losing access to critical benefits.",
    "Prior to the CalABLE program, people with disabilities who received public benefits were restricted to saving only $2,000 per year.",
    "With CalABLE, eligible individuals will be able to contribute $15,000 a year into an ABLE account without losing public benefits.",
    "Eligible individuals can save up to $529,000 in an ABLE account while maintaining benefits such as Medi-Cal and CalFresh.",
    "Those who wish to remain eligible for SSI can contribute up to $100,000 into an ABLE account without the funds counting as assets.",
    "CalABLE will empower people with disabilities to create their own safety net and build wealth.",
    "Living with a disability should not equate to living life on the brink of poverty.",
    "The ABLE accounts will allow individuals and families to have the financial freedom they need to keep their families out of poverty."
  ]
}
```
